title: New Sword Blocking
description: Restores and enhances sword blocking in Minecraft 1.21.5 - 1.21.8!
body:
<center>

![image](https://i.imgur.com/NJx3aJQ.png)

A simple data pack & Fabric/Quilt mod that restores and enhances sword blocking in Minecraft 1.21.5 - 1.21.8.

</center>

# End of Life Announcement
New Sword Blocking is no longer supported. The data pack and mod are available as-is and there won't be any updates or assistance. Please read more [here](https://github.com/Classic36-Media/New-Sword-Blocking/wiki/End-of-Life-Announcement).

## Features

* Newly crafted swords can be used to block attacks by right-clicking while holding the sword in the main hand
* Swords block a percentage of damage from incoming attacks and lose durability points for each attack blocked, based on the material type of the sword:

<center>

| Sword | Damage Blocked | Durability Lost*
| :--: | :--: | :--: |
Wooden | 20% | 7
Golden | 25% | 9
Stone | 30% | 5
Iron | 40% | 4
Diamond | 50% | 3
Netherite | 60% | 2

*per 10 damage blocked

</center>

**NOTE:**

The changes made by this pack do not apply to: 
- Swords crafted before installation
- Swords dropped by mobs
- Swords traded by Villagers
- Swords found in loot chests
- Swords combined by crafting
- Swords taken from the Creative inventory
- Swords given through commands
- Modded or non-vanilla swords

<center>

![image](https://i.imgur.com/i0UMYSB.gif)

</center>

## Versions

**[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required to run the mod version of New Sword Blocking.** Be sure to install the correct Fabric API version that matches your Minecraft and New Sword Blocking versions.

| Minecraft Version | Pack Version | Mod Version
| :--: | :--: | :--: |
| 1.21.5 - 1.21.8 | [v1.1.2](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/version/v1.1.2) | [v1.1.2+mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/version/v1.1.2+mod)
| 1.21.5 - 1.21.7 | [v1.1.1](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/version/v1.1.1) | [v1.1.1+mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/version/v1.1.1+mod)
| 1.21.5 - 1.21.6 | [v1.1.0](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/version/v1.1.0) | [v1.1.0+mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/version/v1.1.0+mod)
| 1.21.5 | [v1.0.0](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/version/v1.0.0) | [v1.0.0+mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/version/v1.0.0+mod)

A full list of versions can be found [here on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-sword-blocking/versions) or [here on GitHub](https://github.com/Classic36-Media/New-Sword-Blocking/wiki/Versions).
